mapper.insert: /* FathMapper.insertFathSelfUrl */ INSERT INTO NMCP_FATH_SELF_URL@DL_MCP( UUID, RES_NO, OPER_TYPE, URL, EXPIR_DT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES( #{uuid}, #{resNo}, #{operType}, #{url}, SYSDATE + 1, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /* FathMapper.updateFathMobile */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP SET FATH_MOBILE_FN = SUBSTR(#{smsRcvTelNo}, 1, 3), FATH_MOBILE_MN = SUBSTR(#{smsRcvTelNo}, 4, 4), FATH_MOBILE_RN = SUBSTR(#{smsRcvTelNo}, 8, 4), RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo})

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgSelfCertTypeMinor */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP SET NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{minorSelfCertType}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = (SELECT CUST_REQ_SEQ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo})

/* FathMapper.updateFathTransacId */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP SET FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId}, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT = '', CPNT_ID = #{cpntId}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo}
mapper.select: /* FathMapper.selectFathInfo */ SELECT CASE WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN T3.MINOR_AGENT_NAME /* 미성년자*/ ELSE T2.CSTMR_NAME END AS CSTMR_NAME, CASE WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(T3.MINOR_AGENT_RRN) /* 미성년자*/ WHEN T1.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NA' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(T2.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) /* 내국인*/ ELSE CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(T2.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN) /* 외국인*/ END AS CSTMR_RRN FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP T1 ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP T2 ,MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP T3 WHERE T1.REQUEST_KEY = T2.REQUEST_KEY AND T1.REQUEST_KEY = T3.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND T1.RES_NO = #{resNo}

/* FathMapper.selectFathResltPush */ SELECT FATH_TRANSAC_ID AS fathTransacId, SLS_CMPC_CD AS slsCmpcCd, RETV_CD_VAL AS retvCdVal, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CUST_NM) AS custNm, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CUST_IDFY_NO) AS custIdfyNo, ISS_DATE_VAL AS issDateVal, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(DRIVE_LICNS_NO) AS driveLicnsNo, MBL_IDCARD_QR_IMG AS mblIdcardQrImg, IDCARD_CONF_WAY AS idcardConfWay, DIST_RSRTN_YN AS distRsrtnYn, FATH_PROGR_STEP_CD AS fathProgrStepCd, FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT AS fathCmpltNtfyDt, FATH_URL_RQT_DT AS fathUrlRqtDt, FATH_RESLT_CD AS fathResltCd, FATH_RESLT_SBST AS fathResltSbst, FATH_RQTR_ID AS fathRqtrId FROM NMCP_FATH_RESLT_PUSH@DL_MCP WHERE FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId} AND SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM NMCP_FATH_RESLT_PUSH@DL_MCP WHERE FATH_TRANSAC_ID = #{fathTransacId})
/* FathMapper.getNameChgInfo */ SELECT CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo}

/* FathMapper.selectFathInfoMcn */ SELECT CASE WHEN CHG.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN AGT.NEE_AGENT_NAME /* 미성년자*/ ELSE CHG.CSTMR_NAME END AS CSTMR_NAME, CASE WHEN CHG.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NM' THEN CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(AGT.NEE_AGENT_RRN) /* 미성년자*/ ELSE CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CHG.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) END AS CSTMR_RRN FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP CHG ,NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP AGT WHERE CHG.CUST_REQ_SEQ = AGT.CUST_REQ_SEQ(+) AND CHG.MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo}
mapper.update: /* FathMapper.updateSelfCertInfoMinor */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP SET MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo})

/* FathMapper.updateSelfCertInfo */ UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP SET SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = (SELECT REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE RES_NO = #{resNo})
mapper.select: SELECT CPNT_ID FROM ( SELECT CPNT_ID FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO WHERE FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_CPNT_INFO) AND CPNT_ID IN (SELECT CPNT_ID FROM MDS_ORG_REL_INFO WHERE ORG_ID = (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{cntpntShopId}) AND FILE_NM = (SELECT MAX(FILE_NM) FROM MDS_ORG_REL_INFO) ) AND CH_TYPE_DIV_CD = '02' --비대면 (안면인증) AND SALE_TYPE_DIV_CD = '14' --비대면 (안면인증) ORDER BY CPNT_NO_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: /* FathMapper.updateNameChgSelfCertInfoMinor */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP SET NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = (SELECT CUST_REQ_SEQ FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo})

/* FathMapper.updateNameChgSelfCertInfo */ UPDATE NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP SET SELF_CERT_TYPE = #{selfCertType}, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT = #{selfIssuExprDt}, SELF_ISSU_NUM = #{selfIssuNum}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE MCN_RES_NO = #{mcnResNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'fathCertPolicy' AND DTL_CD = 'FT1MSP' AND DTL_CD_NM = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
